HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

GreenFLayered3D Class Reference
Modules » Green's Functions

Layered background Green's function with tabulation and D/K/delta/kappa integrals. More...

#include <GreenFLayered3D.h>

virtual dcmplx IntegrateD (RWGFun *f, RWGFun *fp)
 D-operator matrix element \(\langle \mathbf{f}(\mathbf{r}),\,\overline{\overline G},\,\mathbf{f}(\mathbf{r}^{\prime})\rangle\).
 
virtual dcmplx IntegrateK (RWGFun *f, RWGFun *fp)
 K-operator matrix element \(\langle \mathbf{f}(\mathbf{r}),\,\nabla \times \overline{\overline G},\,\mathbf{f}(\mathbf{r}^{\prime})\rangle\).
 
virtual cvec IntegrateDelta (rvec r, RWGFun *fp)

virtual cvec IntegrateKappa (rvec r, RWGFun *fp)
 \(\boldsymbol \kappa\) term at an observation point.

 Pair of D elements with swapped triangle roles.
 
virtual std::pair< dcmplx, dcmplx > PairK (RWGFun *f, RWGFun *fp)
 Pair of K elements with swapped triangle roles.

static int Etm = 1
 Number of periodic evaluation terms (for periodic GFs).
 

Detailed Description

Layered background Green's function with tabulation and D/K/delta/kappa integrals.

A high-level facade around Sommerfeld-integral evaluation for layered media. It owns:

  • Per-layer wavenumbers k_L (from GreenF base class).
  • Medium parameters epsilon, mu and interface depths zValsInterfaces with derived thickness.
  • Precomputed coefficient tables for different interaction types: intra-layer (top/bottom vs internal) and inter-layer.
  • Interpolation grids (r, z1[, z2]) per interaction group, chosen from mesh-based ranges (triangle barycenters / quadrature points).

The class exposes pointwise kernels (scalar/grad/dyadic) and assembly helpers (SameTriDK, SameTriDeltaKappa) used by SIEFormPMCHW.

Definition at line 58 of file GreenFLayered3D.h.

Constructor & Destructor Documentation

◆ GreenFLayered3D() [1/2]

GreenFLayered3D::GreenFLayered3D ( dcmplx inWavelength,
const std::vector< dcmplx > & inEpsilonMedium,
const std::vector< double > & inZValsInterfaces,
const std::vector< double > & inThickness,
const std::vector< Grid > & inTabulationGrids,
const bool enableLineInt = false,
int inMidLayerIndex = 0 )

Construct layered Green's function (non-magnetic layers).

Parameters
inWavelengthVacuum wavelength \(\lambda_0\).
inEpsilonMediumRelative permittivities for all layers (bottom->top).
inZValsInterfacesMonotone increasing z of interfaces (size = nLayers-1).
inThicknessLayer thicknesses (size = nLayers-2).
inTabulationGridsInterpolation grids per interaction bucket.
enableLineIntEnable interface line-integrals for singular cancellation.
inMidLayerIndexLayer index of the middle point in the mesh.

const std::vector< dcmplx > & inEpsilonMedium,

const std::vector< double > & inThickness,
const std::vector< Grid > & inTabulationGrids,
const bool enableLineInt = false,
int inMidLayerIndex = 0 )

Construct layered Green's function (magnetic layers).

Parameters
inWavelengthVacuum wavelength \(\lambda_0\).
inEpsilonMediumRelative permittivities for all layers (bottom -> top).
inMuMediumRelative permeabilities for all layers (bottom -> top).
inZValsInterfacesMonotone increasing z of interfaces (size = nLayers-1).
inThicknessLayer thicknesses (size = nLayers-2).
inTabulationGridsInterpolation grids per interaction bucket.
enableLineIntEnable interface line-integrals for singular cancellation.
inMidLayerIndexLayer index of the middle point in the mesh.

◆ evalGreenQSInter()

std::map< std::string, dcmplx > GreenFLayered3D::evalGreenQSInter ( const rvec pos1,
const rvec pos2,
double rho,
double Z,
double R,
bool singCancFields = false )

Evaluate quasi-static (QS) contributions for inter-layer interactions.

Parameters
pos1Observation point (Cartesian) in layer i.
pos2Source point (Cartesian) in layer j (j != i).
rhoIn-plane separation \(\rho\) between pos1 and pos2.
ZVertical distance between the two points.
RFull 3D source–observer separation.
singCancFieldsIf true, arrange/return terms for singular-cancellation formulations used by line/surface splits.
Returns
Map from component name to complex QS value. The key set follows the tabulation.
Note
Uses the low-krho limits of the Fresnel coefficients as implemented in the layered-media utilities.

Definition at line 3028 of file GreenFLayered3D.cpp.

Here is the call graph for this function:
Here is the caller graph for this function:

◆ evalGreenQSIntra()

std::map< std::string, dcmplx > GreenFLayered3D::evalGreenQSIntra ( const rvec pos,
const std::string & interactionType,
double rho,
double Z1,
double Z2,
double R1,
double R2,
bool singCancFields = false )

Evaluate quasi-static (QS) contributions for intra-layer interactions.

Parameters
posReference Cartesian position used to determine the type of intra-layer interaction and the appropriate QS images.
interactionTypeInteraction identifier (e.g., "intraTB" or "intraIn").
rhoIn-plane separation \(\rho\) between the two points.
Z1Vertical distance z+z' for half-space intra-layer interactions or z-z' for inner intra-layer interactions (the different definitions, can be found in cartesianToLayeredQS() of LayeredMediaUtils).
Z2Vertical distance z+z' inner intra-layer (the definition can be found in cartesianToLayeredQS() of LayeredMediaUtils).
R1Full 3D distance in (rho, Z1).
R2Full 3D distance in (rho, Z2).
singCancFieldsIf true, arrange/return terms for singular-cancellation formulations used by line/surface splits.
Returns
Map from component name to complex QS value. The key set follows the tabulation.

Definition at line 2915 of file GreenFLayered3D.cpp.

Here is the call graph for this function:
Here is the caller graph for this function:

◆ evalGreenSmoothInter()

std::map< std::string, dcmplx > GreenFLayered3D::evalGreenSmoothInter ( double R,
double Z1,
double Z2,
int coeffIndex )

Evaluate Green's-function components for inter-layer interactions by interpolating the smooth (Sommerfeld) coefficient volume.

Uses the 3D tables built for pairs of distinct layers; indices and table keys must match those produced in FillGreenFTable.

Parameters
RIn-plane radial separation \(\rho\) between source and observation.
Z1Vertical distance z inter-layer interaction (definition can be found in cartesianToLayeredTab() of LayeredMediaUtils).
Z2Vertical distance z' inter-layer (definition can be found in cartesianToLayeredTab() of LayeredMediaUtils).
coeffIndexIndex selecting which interpolation coefficients to use.
Returns
std::map from component name to complex value at (R, Z1, Z2). The key set follows the tabulation.
Note
Queries are clamped to the volume bounds; linear blending may be used along sparse axes depending on grid density.

Definition at line 2891 of file GreenFLayered3D.cpp.

Here is the call graph for this function:
Here is the caller graph for this function:

◆ evalGreenSmoothIntra()

std::map< std::string, dcmplx > GreenFLayered3D::evalGreenSmoothIntra ( const std::string & interactionType,
double R,
double Z1,
double Z2,
int coeffIndex )

Evaluate Green's function components for intra-layer interactions by interpolating the smooth (Sommerfeld) coefficient tables.

Interpolates pretabulated complex coefficients on the (R, Z1, Z2) grid built during FillGreenFTable for the requested bucket.

Parameters
interactionTypeIdentifier for the intra-layer type. Must match the key used at tabulation time.
RIn-plane radial separation \(\rho\) between source and observation.
Z1Vertical distance z+z' for half-space intra-layer interactions or z-z' for inner intra-layer interactions (the different definitions, can be found in cartesianToLayeredTab() of LayeredMediaUtils).
Z2Vertical distance z+z' inner intra-layer (the definition can be found in cartesianToLayeredTab() of LayeredMediaUtils).
coeffIndexIndex selecting which interpolation coefficients to use.
Returns
std::map from component name to complex value at (R, Z1, Z2). The key set follows the tabulation.
Note
Queries are clamped to the grid box; outside-range inputs fall back to boundary interpolation.

Here is the call graph for this function:

◆ evaluateSinglePoint() [1/2]

double GreenFLayered3D::evaluateSinglePoint ( double x,
double y,
double z,
std::tuple< std::vector< double >, std::vector< double >, std::vector< double >, std::vector< dcmplx > > & inCoeffs,
std::string type )

Evaluate 3D interpolant at one query point using per-slice 2D regridding and Catmull–Rom cubic in z.

Parameters
xQuery X (typically r).
yQuery Y (typically z1).
zQuery Z (typically z2).
inCoeffsTuple (Xv,Yv,Zv,Fc) where Fc is complex column-major volume.
type"real" or "imag" to select part of Fc.
Returns
Interpolated value (real-valued) at (x,y,z).

Performs bicubic 2D interpolation on bracketing z-slices and blends along z with Catmull–Rom. Clamps queries to the grid box; uses linear interpolation if mz==1.

Definition at line 272 of file GreenFLayered3D.cpp.

Here is the call graph for this function:

◆ evaluateSinglePoint() [2/2]

double GreenFLayered3D::evaluateSinglePoint ( double x,
double y,
std::tuple< std::vector< dcmplx >, std::vector< int >, std::vector< int >, std::vector< double >, std::vector< double > > & inCoeffs,
std::string type )

Evaluate 2D interpolant at one query point.

Parameters
xQuery X (e.g., radial distance r).
yQuery Y (e.g., z-like coordinate).
inCoeffsTuple produced by tabulation: (F_flat, px, py, Xc, Yc). F_flat is column-major (x fastest) complex values on grid.
typeWhich component of F to interpolate: "real" or "imag".
Returns
Interpolated value (real-valued) of the requested component.
Note
Uses regridpack (bicubic by default). Inputs are clamped to grid box.
Warning
If ier!=0 is reported, the regridpack call failed; result is still returned but may be inaccurate.

◆ GetLayerIndex()

int GreenFLayered3D::GetLayerIndex ( rvec pos) const

Return layer index of a 3D point.

Parameters
posCartesian position.
Returns
0 for bottom half-space, 1..n-1 for internal layers, n for top half-space.

This function identifies the index of the layer in which a given point resides based on its z-coordinate relative to the predefined interface positions.

fTesting RWG function (on observation triangle).

dcmplx GreenFLayered3D::IntegrateK ( RWGFun * f,

virtual

K-operator matrix element \(\langle \mathbf{f}(\mathbf{r}),\,\nabla \times \overline{\overline G},\,\mathbf{f}(\mathbf{r}^{\prime})\rangle\).

Parameters
fTesting RWG function (on observation triangle).
fpBasis RWG function (on source triangle).
Returns
Complex scalar entry of \(\mathbf K\).
Note
Not used here.

◆ SameTriDeltaKappa()

void GreenFLayered3D::SameTriDeltaKappa ( rvec r,
const std::vector< RWGFun * > & fpvec,
std::vector< std::pair< cvec, cvec > > & DeltaKappa )
virtual

Point–triangle delta/kappa contributions for RHS assembly.

Parameters
rObservation point.
fpvecRWG list on the source triangle.
DeltaKappaOutput pair per RWG: (delta vector, kappa vector).

Uses near-singular smoothing and, for layered media, augments with reflected/quasistatic parts from the tables.

Implements GreenF.

Definition at line 2261 of file GreenFLayered3D.cpp.

Here is the call graph for this function:

◆ SameTriDK()

void GreenFLayered3D::SameTriDK ( const std::vector< RWGFun * > & fvec,
const std::vector< RWGFun * > & fpvec,
std::vector< std::vector< std::pair< dcmplx, dcmplx > > > & DK )
virtual

Triangle–triangle D/K blocks assembly for all RWG pairs on two triangles.

Parameters
fvecRWGs on test triangle T.
fpvecRWGs on basis triangle Tp.
DKOutput matrix with pairs {D,K} for every (f,fp) pair.

Chooses between free-space and layered contributions; for layered media, splits smooth (tabulated) and quasistatic parts and adds optional interface line-integrals when needed.

Implements GreenF.

Definition at line 1695 of file GreenFLayered3D.cpp.

Here is the call graph for this function:

◆ SameTriDKG()

void GreenFLayered3D::SameTriDKG ( const std::vector< RWGFun * > & fvec,
const std::vector< RWGFun * > & fpvec,
std::vector< std::vector< std::pair< dcmplx, dcmplx > > > & DK,
std::vector< std::vector< std::pair< cvec, cvec > > > & DKG )
virtual

Same as SameTriDK and additionally accumulates gradients.

Parameters
fvecRWGs on the observation triangle.
fpvecRWGs on the source triangle.
DKOutput matrix of \((D,K)\) pairs.
DKGOutput matrix of gradient pairs per entry.
Note
Not implemented for layered media.

Implements GreenF.

Test filling of interpolation tables with Green's function values.

intraTBTypeIntra-layer top/bottom selector.

numPointsNumber of sample points to generate per table/dimension.

◆ testSameTriDK()

void GreenFLayered3D::testSameTriDK ( std::vector< rvec > verts1,
std::vector< rvec > verts2,
std::string gType,
std::string vertPrint )

Test assembly of same-triangle D and K matrix elements.

Parameters
verts1Vertices of the first triangle (3 entries: r0,r1,r2).
verts2Vertices of the second triangle (3 entries: r0',r1',r2').
gTypeGreen's function tag used in the test.
vertPrintVerbose label or mode controlling vertex printing in the debug output.

xX-coordinates (size N).

inVecComplex values at (x,y) (size N).
filenameOutput .txt filename (overwritten if exists).

void GreenFLayered3D::writeVectorToFile ( const std::vector< rvec > & rho,
const std::vector< double > & inVec,
const std::string & filename )

Write real data with associated 2D coordinates (rho as rvec) to a text file.

Parameters
rho2D positions as rvec entries (size N); only in-plane components are used.
inVecReal values at positions (size N).
filenameOutput .txt filename (overwritten if exists).
